concerns.text: FR-001 mandates downloading DNS data from JHTDB. The plan.md and research.md explicitly state JHTDB is not in the 'Verified Datasets' block and propose a fallback to synthetic data generation. This leaves FR-001 unbacked by a concrete implementation task for the primary requirement (real data download), creating a silent gap in the spec coverage for the actual data source.

FR-009 requires verifying correlation robustness across 'at least two distinct thresholding methods (e.g., normalized RMS vs. absolute vorticity)'. The plan.md and research.md only describe sensitivity analysis across multiples of RMS (2x, 3x, 4x). There is no explicit plan element to implement or test an 'absolute vorticity' thresholding method, leaving the 'distinct methods' requirement of FR-009 unaddressed.

SC-007 requires measuring correlation robustness by comparing r values across distinct thresholding methods. Since the plan fails to implement the second distinct method (absolute vorticity) required by FR-009, there is no corresponding plan element to measure or report this specific success criterion.
